answer:
To convert **10 miles per gallon (mpg)** to **kilometers per liter (km/L)**, use the following conversion factors:
- 1 mile ≈ 1.60934 kilometers
- 1 gallon ≈ 3.78541 liters

The conversion is:
\[
10 \, \text{mpg} \times \frac{1.60934 \, \text{km/mile}}{3.78541 \, \text{liters/gallon}} \approx 4.22 \, \text{km/L}
\]

The closest option is **G. 4.16 kilometers per liter**.

\boxed{G}
